title: Georgia: 7 Days at the Birthplace of Wine - Tbilisi, Kakheti and the Qvevri Route
subtitle: A 7-day loop from Tbilisi through Kakheti's vineyards, medieval monasteries, and underground cellars traces 8,000 years of winemaking from the Neolithic to the natural wine revival.
climate: Best time: May-June and September-October, temperatures 18-26°C, perfect for vineyards (September = harvest season). Avoid July-August (scorching heat 32-38°C, intense sun in Kakheti). Winter is cold but dry, snow rare in Tbilisi.

title: Georgia: 8,000 Years of Wine in 7 Days
subtitle: A seven-day journey through Tbilisi's wine bars, Kakheti's monastery cellars, and the buried qvevris of the Alazani Valley.
climate: Best time: April-June and September-October, temperatures 15-25°C, perfect for wine tastings and vineyard visits. Avoid July-August (intense heat up to 35°C, harvest not yet started). September offers the bonus of traditional qvevri grape harvest.

title: French Guiana Journey: Kourou, Amazon Rainforest & Coast
subtitle: From Cayenne to the Maroni River, where penal colony history meets Ariane rockets and Kaw's wild marshes
climate: Best time: August-November (dry season), temperatures 26-30°C, constant humidity but manageable. Avoid April-July: torrential daily rainfall, forest trails become challenging. French Guiana's Amazon stays hot and humid year-round.

title: Guadeloupe Circuit: Carbet Falls and Cousteau Reserve
subtitle: Discover Guadeloupe's natural wonders, from volcanic peaks to pristine lagoons and coral gardens
climate: Best time: December to May, temperatures 25-30°C, low rainfall. Avoid August-October (hurricane season, torrential rains on La Soufrière). High humidity year-round, but manageable in dry season.

subtitle: This 10-day road trip connects Skopje to Ohrid through Byzantine monasteries, ancient lakes and wild mountains.
climate: Best period: May-June and September-October, temperatures 15-25°C, ideal for lakes and mountains. Avoid July-August (scorching heat in Skopje and Bitola, 35-40°C) and winter in mountains (snow at Mavrovo and Pelister, difficult roads). Continental climate with dry summers and occasional storms.

title: Réunion Island Circuit: Cirques, Volcanoes & Beaches
subtitle: Clockwise loop from Saint-Denis: three UNESCO-listed cirques, France's most active volcano, and the turquoise lagoon of the west coast.
climate: Best time: May to October (austral winter), 20-26°C on the coast, 12-20°C in the cirques, dry and sunny. Avoid January to March: cyclone season, torrential rains in the highlands, oppressive humid heat (28-32°C). The volcano is accessible year-round but hike during the dry season.

title: Rwanda: 13-Day Loop Through Gorillas, Lakes & Volcanoes
subtitle: This 13-day road trip sweeps across Rwanda from Akagera to the Virunga volcanoes, via Nyungwe and Lake Kivu.
climate: Best period: June-September and December-February, temperatures 15-25°C, ideal for gorilla trekking. Avoid March-May (heavy rains, muddy trails in Nyungwe and Volcanoes forests). Evenings are cool at altitude, bring layers.

Uruguay: 16-day grand loop, coast and pampa
subtitle: This 16-day road trip connects Montevideo to Punta del Este through wild beaches, vineyards, and gaucho country.
climate: Best time: March-May and October-November, temperatures 18-25°C, ideal for beaches and pampas. Avoid December-February (heavy heat up to 35°C, tourist crowds on the coast). Winter June-August is feasible but cool (10-16°C) and humid, not recommended for coastal visits.

title: Wallis and Futuna: Lagoons, Crater Lakes and Tongan Marae
subtitle: Eight days between Wallis' turquoise lagoon, its 15th-century forts and Futuna's wild coasts, birthplace of Oceania's first martyr.
climate: Best time: May to October, temperatures 23-26°C, less rain. Avoid November to April: active cyclone season, heavy rainfall and oppressive heat (28-30°C). High humidity year-round.
